message:
chore(beads): track issue 1a51k for export path race fix

Add closed issue coding_agent_session_search-1a51k documenting the
in-flight export path/status race in the detail modal. The issue
tracked the problem where precomputed output paths in the export
status text could drift from the final deduplicated path under
concurrent collisions. Resolution: removed precomputed path from
in-flight status, relying on ExportCompleted for definitive output
reporting.

Update last-touched pointer from c2tz4 to 1a51k.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
